name: case03_fixed_length_job
description: Case 03: Fixed-length file parsing - S3 single-column text source with SUBSTR extraction to S3 gzip CSV
codeGenConfigurationNodes: {"node-1": {"S3CsvSource": {"AdditionalOptions": {"EnableSamplePath": false, "SamplePath": ""}, "Escaper": "\\", "Exclusions": [], "Name": "S3 Text Source - case03_fixed_length", "OptimizePerformance": false, "OutputSchemas": [{"Columns": [{"Name": "value", "Type": "string"}]}], "Paths": ["s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/preparing/case03_fixed_length/"], "QuoteChar": "disabled", "Recurse": true, "Separator": "tab", "WithHeader": false}}, "node-2": {"SparkSQL": {"Inputs": ["node-1"], "Name": "SQL Query", "OutputSchemas": [{"Columns": []}], "SqlAliases": [{"Alias": "myDataSource", "From": "node-1"}], "SqlQuery": "SELECT TRIM(SUBSTR(value, 1, 20)) AS loan_account_no, TRIM(SUBSTR(value, 21, 100)) AS loan_account_name, TRIM(SUBSTR(value, 121, 10)) AS customer_id, TRIM(SUBSTR(value, 131, 100)) AS customer_name, TRIM(SUBSTR(value, 231, 1)) AS customer_type, TRIM(SUBSTR(value, 232, 5)) AS product_code, TRIM(SUBSTR(value, 237, 2)) AS loan_type, TO_DATE(NULLIF(TRIM(SUBSTR(value, 239, 10)), ''), 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS open_date, TO_DATE(NULLIF(TRIM(SUBSTR(value, 249, 10)), ''), 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS maturity_date, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(SUBSTR(value, 259, 14)), '') AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS loan_amount, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(SUBSTR(value, 273, 14)), '') AS DECIMAL(14,2)) AS outstanding_balance, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(SUBSTR(value, 287, 5)), '') AS DECIMAL(5,2)) AS interest_rate, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(SUBSTR(value, 292, 3)), '') AS INT) AS payment_term_months, TRIM(SUBSTR(value, 295, 1)) AS payment_frequency, TRIM(SUBSTR(value, 296, 1)) AS loan_status, TRIM(SUBSTR(value, 297, 1)) AS npl_flag, TRIM(SUBSTR(value, 298, 5)) AS branch_code, TRIM(SUBSTR(value, 303, 100)) AS branch_name, TO_DATE(NULLIF(TRIM(SUBSTR(value, 403, 10)), ''), 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS as_of_date FROM myDataSource WHERE LENGTH(TRIM(value)) > 0"}}, "node-3": {"S3DirectTarget": {"AutoDataQuality": {"IsEnabled": false}, "Compression": "gzip", "Format": "csv", "Inputs": ["node-2"], "Name": "S3 Gzip CSV Target - case03_fixed_length", "NumberTargetPartitions": "0", "PartitionKeys": [], "Path": "s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/staging/case03_fixed_length/load/", "SchemaChangePolicy": {"EnableUpdateCatalog": false}}}}
